reviews.title: Nice hard case to protect AirPods
reviews.text: This is a nice hard case to use to protect your AirPods if you like to go hiking or running.  This gives you added protection in case it fall or drops. There is a push latch that you use to open the case and a key ring to attach to your backpack.  The latch locks the case so it doesn't come open by mistake and the material of the case is sturdy and is easy to hold.  The pattern on the case is attractive and makes sure you don't see fingerprints. This is a must have for attractiveness and safety .

reviews.title: Cheap Buys Cheap
reviews.text: Not sure what I expected for so little, so shame on me. I'll tell you these made my 9-year-old's ears hurt. I'm not sure how they could cancel any noise, as there is no buffer. I tried the ones she put on and they are very uncomfortable. Returning.

reviews.title: Great product and great price.
reviews.text: We bought a pack of these for my son because he goes through headphones crazy fast; since we bought these, he's still on the first pair. We will be buying more in the future if we have to.

reviews.title: They are priced low enough that a defective or marginal one doesn't sour the price.
reviews.text: Quality control could be a little better, but the price for the multipack is tough to beat.

reviews.title: For the cost… I am super happy with them.
reviews.text: I’m giving these earbuds five stars because they exceed my expectations when they only cost seventy cents each. I find it hard to complain about these, especially considering the cost. The sound is quite adequate for such earbuds. I use these in a classroom setting for kids who either cannot afford earbuds or forget there is at home. They are individually packaged. Nice assortment of colors. Though they are being sold by a US company, I do not show where they are made. I can only assume they are made in China.

reviews.title: Great Sound Just Wish they had a Microphone
reviews.text: Fun colors and love this type of ear plug over the cone shaped style. Listening to music on my phone sounds great  but I wish they had a microphone so I could easily answer calls. Now I have to unplug the earphones when the phone starts to ring and then re-plug after I'm done on the call. I guess they are really designed for use on exclusive music players. The listing is confusing because it says "Bluetooth" which they don't have, but the wire is about 4ft. long so your music unit can easily be kept anywhere convenient. No volume control either so that has to be handled on your phone/music player.

reviews.title: Nice, just don't like having to remove them to charge it
reviews.text: I really like them and my AirPods feel much more secure in my ears.  I can move my head and they don't fall out.  The only thing I don't like is that they won't charge in the charger unless you remove them.

reviews.title: Solves AirPod Issue
reviews.text: I have a love/hate relationship with my AirPods and these are making me love them a LOT more. On their own, my AirPods cause my ears to hurt terribly. Not to mention, they fall out at the slightest movement, like smiling or turning my head. Talk about ANNOYING. These tips cure those ailments. Now I can exercise with my AirPods in and never worry about them falling out. I have tiny ears, and the fit is great with no discomfort at all. I love that the little hook sticks up into the cartilage of my ear to make a really secure fit. The silicon keeps the buds from irritating my ears too. I’m so happy I got these. Now I can actually put my AirPods to good use.

reviews.title: These Really Help to Keep the AirPods 2nd gen in Place.
reviews.text: The only issue I've every had with my AirPods is them staying in while active. These are comfortable and keep them in place along with them being comfortable.

reviews.title: Worked great on OnePlus earbuds

reviews.title: Great

reviews.title: Great for TV
reviews.text:
So far the KBEAR Larks are the best sounding dual driver in-ear I have used. I have used them for listing music, playing and singing live and even watching TV. In comparison, I have about 5 different pair of dual driver in ears. These are by far my favorite.

Live music:
I use more expensive 5-8 driver in ears for playing live. I will say these don’t stack up against the more expensive in-ears but if I had to choose from this price bracket then I would choose these.

Great for TV:
Recently I tried all my in-ears(12 pair) for listening to tv. My parents often do this as they are hard of hearing and they get a much better listening experience with headphones. Therefore, I thought I would find the most well rounded pair for doing just that. These won! I preferred them, even over headphones that cost twice as much.

Listening to music:
These got the job done. I wasn’t amazed but they didn’t leave a lot to be desired either.

EQ:
Slightly elevated lows and highs. To me they weren’t harsh. They lacked some clarity but nothing sounded intrusive to my ears which tends to happen with other brands.

Pros:
-Nice packaging
-Quality case
-Somewhat a jack of all trades. Do many things well.
-Look stylish
-Fit my ears well
-Comfortable especially with replacement memory foam tips

Cons:
-Silicone tips suck. Replace with memory foam.
-My other 2 pin cords didn’t fit these.

reviews.title: Good value and monitor sound is good for music and voices.
reviews.text: I use these IEMs while singing with my church's praise team. The sound quality is good and allows good distinction of sounds without distortion or static. Connecting the wire to each ear bud was easy in comparison the other brand I had. I've not had any issues with them disconnecting. I also like the copper cord since it is more inconspicuous with colored clothing. The length of the cord is long enough to run down the back of my shirt and into the pack on my waistband. I am satisfied with this product and would buy them again.

reviews.title: OK IEMs
reviews.text: Work OK but sound quality not as good as other in ear monitors that I own in the same price range.

reviews.title: Great sound for a cheap fun IEM! Fake sloppy bass lol
reviews.text: The KBEAR KS2 are actually pretty great sounding! I was really surprised for the price on these the sound is really Bassy and fun. The dynamic driver 10mm produces some intense bass and deep lows that sound stunning and the balanced armature mixes almost perfectly together. Vocals are pushed forward a bit and mids are also. Kind of hard to explain I haven’t listened that much yet but compared to my Jade Audio EA3 they aren’t as professional sounding it’s more of a enhanced sloppy bass and everything is pushed forward more. Still a fun IEM though I would definitely recommend them given you get some different ear tips and a cord if you have an extra (it’s not horrible).

reviews.title: Cheap headphones
reviews.text: No proper manual, no mention of noise-cancelling

reviews.title: Big Lag
reviews.text: I use this headset for working from home, and every phone call is a struggle due to lag. I am constantly talking over people or being talked over by them. It's functional, but not ideal perhaps for phone calls.

reviews.title: Big Upgrade for me!!
reviews.text: These are fantastic!  I had a pair that pooped out in less than a year, I got these with my fingers crossed and so far they are a BIG UPGRADE!!! Voice clarity & noise canceling are great!  I work from home with 2 big dogs, it matters for me.

reviews.title: Very happy
reviews.text: I really like this headset.  I love the charging station as I often woukd forget to charge my last headset that was charged with usb cable.  My only issue with the headset is that the headband is not adjustable and I have a smaller head so the support bar sits a little low.  Very good connection and stays connected if I move around the house.

reviews.title: It Won't Charge
reviews.text: It worked wonderfully for a couple months and now it won't charge. I have switched outlets thinking it was my outlet. I also make sureits lined up in charging base. I loved it until it stopped working. Its a little pricey to only get 2 month use.

reviews.title: Comfortable for truckers and the office.
reviews.text:
I am a dispatcher and I have to wear a headset 8hrs a day. I can stand this one for about 6 hrs. before I need to switch ears. That is better than most headsets I have used. My office orders $300 headsets and this one can throw down with the best of them. The noise cancelation is excellent and the calls sound loud and clear. The Bluetooth connection last the entire 8+ hour shift. Once paired it connects seamlessly when I set up for my day.

Before you spend hundreds of dollars on a headset, give this one a chance. I am glad I did.

I hope this helps. :-)

Sound quality is good and mic quality isn't bad, either.  After wearing them for an hour, my ears really need a break, though - but I have a pretty big head; these should be more comfortable for my middle schoolers.  I wish they came with a blue accent as an option, though.  The ones at school will have the green accents.

Speaker and LCD display: adopts 40MM large-diameter drive unit, high-magnetic neodymium iron boron magnetic material structure, professional anti-noise, beautiful and clear sound quality, high sensitivity, and the stereophonic design of the product line shows an excellent bass effect.LCD liquid crystal display is clearer and more intuitive than pointer display, which is convenient to quickly adjust to the required channel.

Reception FM radio: supports FM (No AM) transistor radio with an automatic search and store feature which can make up to 11 preset stations for you to cycle through your favorites. With memory function, it can memorize the frequency points and saved frequency points before shutting down (or changing the battery).

reviews.title: I'm not keen on the cover material
reviews.text:
While the Arae Electronic Organizer does what it says, its implementation isn't great.

The double layers of this product has one and a half flap of elastic bands to hold bundled up wires, that's 18 spots total. The rest are two large pockets and a small pocket. That's plenty of room to carry most charging accessories that you'd have with you if you were equipped with tablets and phones. For laptops and cameras, you'll need other solutions. Even action camera chargers may have a hard time fitting in this slim product.

It's not a problem that this thing is pretty much made out of nylon from the outside in but the material that makes up the exterior of this product makes it look cheap. It's a rough, synthetic material that just makes it a bit cheap looking. I think cloth or leather would have been a better choice.

In addition, the zipper sticks, making it hard to quickly open this up to retrieve your wires for charging.

reviews.title: Case closed
reviews.text:
It's pretty amazing how much this will hold and still close up properly. I am using it for many cables and some adapters, and I am also keeping those little instruction manuals that come with everything in one of the zipper pouches. You can keep a lot of cables and adapters in this, and it will still zip up and be small enough for travel.
I like this case a lot.

reviews.title: Smaller than expected
reviews.text: Water proof? Not going to try that. This is super slim so you can't really fit a whole lot in. Wires, maybe... but devices, like portable routers, not exactly. Slim portable chargers, sure. Higher capacity batteries, nope. Won't fit anything more than two iPhones thick.

reviews.title: No More Ziplock Bags
reviews.text: This is such a better alternative to tossing cables into a ziplock bag.  The nice bag with zipper allows me to keep everything in one place.  I wished the compartments were a little wider, but it's easy to just use two compartments. Nice quality bag, once I get spares I would just pack these with a spare ready and be ready to go anytime.  Nice organization addition to my travel gear.

reviews.title: Handy little case
reviews.text: Does a good job at cutting down on cable clutter. I took a black Sharpie and identified the various cords by writing abbreviations on the cloth stretch band that secures the cords. It also helps organize miscellaneous adapters and charging units. Not sure how long it will last but for organizing cords and small electronic items it’s a good buy.

description: Experience total freedom on a budget with Jib True. The newest true wireless earbud from Skullcandy is easy to connect and easy to enjoy. Call, track change, and volume controls are all within close reach through one main button. 22 hours of audio on a single charge means you spend less time recharging and more time enjoying your music. Jib True earbuds are adventure-ready, too. An IPX4 rating means Jib True is sweat- and dust-resistant. You don’t need to worry about damage if a little rain kicks up during your urban or outdoor adventure. Dual microphones make your calls more clear and if you feel like keeping one ear open, you can use either bud ‘solo’ without missing a beat.
features: Supreme Sound - Powered by 6mm drivers the Jib features dynamic audio with gnarly bass and a wide sound range. The earbuds also feature bluetooth 5.0 for a strong signal making sure you can listen to your music or take phone calls interruption free.

22 Hours of Play - With a 55mAh battery in the earbud and 500 mAh in the charging case you'll get a whopping 22 hours of charge total, 6 in the earbuds and 16 in the case. Use the included charging case for on the go charging as well as safe storage for your earbuds.

Dual Microphones - keeping you sounding extra clear while on calls or talking to your best friend Siri. Dual mics also means you can have 1 ear open and 1 earbud in while on calls to keep aware of your surroundings.

Small, Medium, Large Ears - Included in the Jib is 3 different eargel tips to make sure you have comfy noise isolating fit. The earbuds are super lightweight and water/dust resistant perfect for the active person!

title: MONOCARBON Carbon Fiber Case for AirPods Pro, Genuine Carbon Fiber Cover for AirPods Pro Charging Box Ultra Slim Strong Protection- Glossy Finishing…
features: Original Design & Exclusive Carbon Fiber Material: MONOCARBON has the characteristics of carbon fiber, never fade, twill weave, frosted treatment, good hand feeling. It is very durable and will last for years. Scratch-free, aramid fiber reinforced, used in body armor, spacecraft, jet engines and Formula One racing, to provide firm protection for your AirPods Pro

Compatible with Wireless Charging Box: MONOCARBON carbon fiber is specially designed for AirPods Pro charging box, and will not interfere with the AirPods Pro series with wireless charging box function. Conveniently charge your AirPods Pro wirelessly without removing the box, plug-in charging via Lightning cable (not included)

Enhanced Protection & Close-Fitting Design: MONOCARBON carbon fiber bulletproof material provides comprehensive protection. Has good impact resistance and scratch resistance. The carbon fiber bulletproof material can help protect the impact of drops and protect your AirPods Pro 3 from daily wear and tear

Fitted Design: Using vacuum forming technology and special three-layer coating technology, each hole and edge of the shell and the Airpods Pro are accurately processed without gaps, and the perfect fit brings a soft and comfortable grip. The LED charging indicator is visible when charging, so you can easily check the charging status

Portable Fashion & Exquisite Gifts: Convenient for you to use on the road or in sports. The luxurious Carbon Fiber style is full of modern, elegant and advanced feeling. This is also an exquisite gift for your friends or family. Find more exquisite products in MONOCARBON

reviews.title: Quality case, needs key ring hook or lanyard
reviews.text: This case looks great.  The air pod pro case fits perfectly, and does not slide out.  The top cap piece adheres fine, all without adhesive.  I really wish it were designed to allow a key ring or some sort of lanyard to attach to my keys.  I carry the case in pocket and always fear it falling out.

reviews.title: Outstanding value!
reviews.text: Highly recommended for anyone needing an Air Pod Pro cover!

reviews.title: Fantastic Quality And Presentation!
reviews.text:
MONOCARBON came in hot with this lite weight protective carbon fiber shell. When opening the box I was kind of surprised the presentation looked really nice. In the box was included ( Carbon Fiber Shell, Lanyard, Cards with info on it, even included a little piece of carbon fiber to keep)

The shell weight is about 8 grams, and is 0.6mm thick. The hole cutouts are precise. Seems very durable and looks like it would withstand some drops and help protect from scratches when it's inside your pocket. The include lanyard is a nice touch and it makes use with the built in lanyard spot in the AirPods itself.

I overall would recommend this product for your EDC especially if you like carbon fiber and light weight / non bulky cases.

reviews.title: A very minimal sleek case for the airPods Pro 2
reviews.text:
I have purchased this brand before for my apple watch series 6 titanium, Ive only had the shell for two days before it decided to walk away, or fell off and went byby. There was no adhesion to the watch and little effort will cause it to come off. Thank you guys for your concern about what we think about your product. Great customer service!

With that said, This case is no different with the top half, it will slip off with out you knowing.

They have no adhesive strips like others will include. I guess they have to high of confidence in their product. Nice as it is, I would expect more.

I have purchase thin strip double sided adhesive through amazon to have around when needed. This was no exception.

Now that I had to vent my concern with their product, I was prepared with handling this concern.

The bottom shell is no problem since the opening for the lanyard will secure the bottom shell, I have added a small strip of double sided adhesive to the sides of the top half shell.

These are the most minimal light weight hardshell cases you can buy, the look great and feel’s great and will take any reasonable
punishment you can give it and
protect what is important.

The packaging is nice, too nice, they could have spent less on the box and a little more on protecting the investment, like adhesive. They do have decals in a strip, if this was to prevent cases from slipping off, you could have fooled me. There was no instructions in the box on anything, 🤔.

Don’t let my concern detour you from making the investment.
